summary: Extended the debug overlay with three new fields: shaderStatus ('pass'|'fail'|'pending'), optionalAttrs (string[] of geometry attribute names present), and qualityTier (string). Added corresponding getters to LoopDeps in the render loop with safe defaults ('pending', [], 'unknown'). Wired the getters in main.ts using errorCollector.hasErrors(), scene traversal for optional attributes, and quality.tier. Updated all existing tests for the new required fields and added 24 new US-053 tests covering the new interface fields, overlay display, privacy/storage checks, disabled-by-default behavior, and render loop getter wiring. Build passes, all 101 tests pass.
